description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with default runner image and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs the commands 'cp .gitlab-stack.yaml stack.yaml' and then 'stack build', and configure a cache that stores the files 'stack.yaml' and the directory '.stack-work'. In the test stage add a haddock job that runs 'stack haddock --fast', and a test job that runs 'stack test'. Ensure the cache is shared across all jobs so the Stack build artifacts are reused.
